claim: No Stable, release, evidentiary integrity, legal retention, security completeness, manual assistive-technology, or distribution parity claim is made.

semantics.nativeBasis: named region, optional native filter form, ordered events and actor/action/object/time definition lists
semantics.rolePolicy: Virtual rows expose set size and position without fabricating grid semantics.

keyboard.behavior: Moves through optional search, action filter, viewport and export action.

keyboard.key: Page Up / Page Down / Home / End
keyboard.behavior: Native scrolling remains available when virtualization focuses the viewport.

nonColor: Actor, action, object, exact time, filter count and export scope are text; color is supplementary.
responsive: Event definition lists collapse from four to two to one columns; long values wrap and virtual viewport remains bounded.
security: CSV fields are quoted and formula-like prefixes are apostrophe-protected. Export is passed to a consumer-owned callback and never uploaded or downloaded automatically.
consumerResponsibilities: Guarantee event immutability, ordering, authorization, integrity, retention and legal policy at the backend.
Do not expose secrets or sensitive personal data in browser event details.
Secure the export destination and revalidate spreadsheet safety downstream.
Localize filters, counts, times and empty states.
